fields.description:
# Create canonical AGENTS.md (rebar dev guide) + reduce CLAUDE.md to a thin @AGENTS.md pointer

## Why

`AGENTS.md` is read natively by Codex, Cursor, Copilot's coding agent, Zed, Windsurf, Amp,
Factory, Jules, Devin, RooCode, and Cline — so one canonical `AGENTS.md` covers the ecosystem,
and Claude Code is bridged by a one-line import. This also fixes the size/duplication
anti-pattern: sections that duplicate a `docs/` file become one-line pointers.

## What

Author a lean `AGENTS.md` at the repo root that keeps rebar-INTERNAL developer specifics inline
and replaces every already-documented topic with a one-line `docs/…md` pointer. Then reduce
`CLAUDE.md` to a single `@AGENTS.md` import plus an optional `## Claude Code` section.

- **INLINE (kept in full):** intro; the record-work/claim-before-you-work operating rules; the
  parallel-agent loop; env bootstrap (`make install`/`make hooks`); module-size policy; Serena
  navigation; a **condensed** Git/Gerrit section; a 6-line library snippet.
- **POINTER (one line each):** gate protocols → `docs/plan-review-gate.md`; quality gates +
  ticket template + project criteria → `docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md`; MCP tool set →
  `docs/mcp-reference.md`; store-shares-writes + parent-first cascade → `docs/concurrency.md`;
  ticket model → `docs/ticket-model.md` (produced by S1); session logs → `docs/event-schema.md`
  + `docs/user-guide.md`; library reference → `docs/reuse-surface.md`.
- **Re-home two stowaways** wedged under CLAUDE.md's "Session logs" heading (do not restate them
  in AGENTS.md): the LLM-agent-operations paragraph → `docs/llm-framework.md`; the
  completion-verification close-gate blockquote → `docs/plan-review-gate.md`.

## Scope

In: new `AGENTS.md`, rewritten `CLAUDE.md`. Out: `CLAUDE.local.md` (S3), the shim/reference sweep
(S6), and code. **Depends on S1** (already linked `depends_on`): `docs/ticket-model.md` must
exist before `AGENTS.md` points at it, and the doc homes must exist before de-dup. Rollback is a
plain `git revert` (docs/text only, no data migration).

## Design decisions (spike-validated)

- The `@AGENTS.md` import is PROVEN in Claude Code 2.1.211 (headless canary + official docs
  recommend exactly `@AGENTS.md` + `## Claude Code`); no symlink fallback.
- Imports "load at launch" and do **not** reduce context, so the token win comes from de-dup into
  docs and **AGENTS.md must itself be lean.** A grounded estimate puts a complete lean file at
  ~152 lines and ≤ 200 **only if** the Git/Gerrit section is condensed to agent-actionable rules
  (split remotes; fresh worktree+venv; `rebar-ticket:` trailer; DCO `Signed-off-by:`; two-vote
  gate; self-Submit; feature-branch for multi-story) and defers the full recipe to
  `CONTRIBUTING.md` (verbatim Gerrit → ~215-230, which misses the target).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `AGENTS.md` exists at repo root and is ≤ 200 lines.
  - Proving: `test -f AGENTS.md && [ "$(wc -l < AGENTS.md)" -le 200 ]`
- [ ] The Git/Gerrit section is condensed (≤ ~55 lines) and defers the full recipe to
  `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
  - Proving: `rg -n 'CONTRIBUTING.md' AGENTS.md` (≥ 1 match); reviewer confirms the section ≤ 55 lines.
- [ ] Each already-documented topic is a one-line pointer, not a restated section.
  - Proving: `rg -n 'docs/plan-review-gate.md|docs/mcp-reference.md|docs/ticket-model.md|docs/concurrency.md|docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md' AGENTS.md`
- [ ] The two stowaways are pointers only (LLM-ops → `docs/llm-framework.md`; close-gate →
  `docs/plan-review-gate.md`), not restated in `AGENTS.md`.
  - Proving: `rg -n 'llm-framework.md' AGENTS.md` (present as a pointer)
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` is a single `@AGENTS.md` import + optional `## Claude Code` section, ≤ 30 lines.
  - Proving: `[ "$(rg -c '@AGENTS.md' CLAUDE.md)" = 1 ] && [ "$(wc -l < CLAUDE.md)" -le 30 ]`
- [ ] `make lint` passes.
  - Proving: `make lint`
